CustomField.formula: IF(Completion_Percentage__c * 100 < 100, IMAGE(IF($Permission.REDU_Admin, '', '/sfsites/c') + '/resource/reduivy__redu_resource/images/ProgressBar_Progressing.png', ' ', 10, (Completion_Percentage__c * 100)) & IMAGE(IF($Permission.REDU_Admin, '', '/sfsites/c') + '/resource/reduivy__redu_resource/images/ProgressBar_NoProgressBlank.png', ' ', 10, (100 - (Completion_Percentage__c * 100))) & ' ' & TEXT(ROUND(Completion_Percentage__c * 100, 0)) & '%', IMAGE(IF($Permission.REDU_Admin, '', '/sfsites/c') + '/resource/reduivy__redu_resource/images/ProgressBar_Progressing.png', ' ', 10, 100) & ' ' & TEXT(ROUND(Completion_Percentage__c * 100, 0)) & '%')
CustomField.label: Completion Progress
